case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ELWOOD MACMURRAY ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-05-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200001334), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACMURRAY, ELWOOD

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MACMURRAY, ELWOOD DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-23-2020

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 66339050) AS TO DEFENDANT MACMURRAY, ELWOOD
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66339050) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-09-2021 CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACMURRAY, ELWOOD $1,463.57 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,735.47, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-08-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
